title: Canonical source_fact and analysis_state_transition contract hardening (DF-4/DF-5)
objective: Close the source_fact and analysis_state_transition canonical contracts (additionalProperties:false, or a single versioned extensions object) so mandatory provenance/audit records can no longer silently accept undocumented keys; provide an allowlist serializer module as a FROZEN interface (not wired into the production entrypoint here); add negative typo/undocumented-field/diagnostic-leak fixtures + contract tests; keep the runtime-bundled copy and generated types byte-identical for the owned schemas only. Deterministic offline; DF-4/DF-5 (Area G).
business_reason: D-002 first-wave lane 3 (Section 7.3); whole-system trust replan Area G / defects DF-4 (source_fact OPEN) + DF-5 (analysis_state_transition OPEN).
inputs: services/api/app/profile/builder.py (READ-ONLY: current source_fact allowlist assembly - reference only; do NOT edit)
outputs: packages/contracts/generated/property_profile.ts (regenerated ONLY if the source_fact change alters it; sole owner in this wave)
services/api/app/contracts/serializers.py (NEW allowlist serializer module; frozen interface, NOT wired into production route)
forbidden_paths: packages/contracts/schemas/v1/property_profile.schema.json, rule_evaluation.schema.json, scenario.schema.json, coverage_status.schema.json, common.schema.json (other canonical contracts)
services/api/app/profile/builder.py and services/api/app/api/** (production serializer wiring deferred to a later integration task)
CLAUDE.md, .claude/**, .github/**, tools/**, render.yaml, packages/contracts/scripts/** (shared generators are frozen), any other task's paths or report
acceptance_scenarios: AS-1 (executable): source_fact and analysis_state_transition reject an undocumented/typo key - negative fixtures FAIL validation; positive fixtures still PASS (python contract-validation suite).

AS-2 (executable): python services/api/scripts/sync_contract_schemas.py --check passes (bundled source_fact byte-identical to canonical); python packages/contracts/scripts/generate_ts_types.py --check passes (property_profile.ts regenerated iff changed, byte-identical).
AS-3 (executable): the new allowlist serializer rejects unknown keys and round-trips only documented fields; serializer unit tests + diagnostic-leak negative tests pass.
AS-4: the serializer is a frozen interface only (not imported by the production route/builder in this task); wiring is explicitly deferred to a controller-contracted integration task.
AS-5: no other canonical contract, generated artifact, or schema is modified (changed-file audit within allowed_paths).
risks: Closing source_fact could break an existing valid fixture that carried an extra key - mitigated: producer audits + updates fixtures within allowed_paths; builder.py assembly is already allowlist-based (DF-4 evidence).
property_profile.ts drift - mitigated: source_fact is the only $ref touched; producer regenerates and owns it solely this wave.
